mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.merchant_id, m.meal_name, m.meal_desc, m.price, m.hot_flag, m.status, s.stock, m.create_time, m.update_time FROM t_meal m LEFT JOIN t_meal_stock s ON m.id = s.meal_id WHERE m.id = #{mealId}

SELECT m.id, m.merchant_id, m.meal_name, m.meal_desc, m.price, m.hot_flag, m.status, s.stock, m.create_time, m.update_time FROM t_meal m LEFT JOIN t_meal_stock s ON m.id = s.meal_id WHERE m.status = 1 AND m.hot_flag = 1
AND m.merchant_id = #{merchantId}
SELECT id FROM t_meal WHERE status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_meal SET meal_name = #{meal.mealName}, meal_desc = #{meal.mealDesc}, price = #{meal.price}, hot_flag = #{meal.hotFlag}, status = #{meal.status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{mealId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, merchant_id, meal_name, meal_desc, price, hot_flag, status, create_time, update_time FROM t_meal WHERE id = #{mealId}
